feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SBO Failed to get database information from SLDClient SLDClientOP::GetCommonDBCredentials Exception
entry.content:
Hello,

I have error when login SAP Business One. Here is error

2024-05-28 16:48:01.099675 Sys Err I Biz SLDClient SLDClientOP::GetCommonDBCredentials SLD Client Exception code:7 message:function return is empty : GetCommonDBCredential # # TID=9348 sldclient.cpp 1152 Customized=0
2024-05-28 16:48:01.113425 Sys Err I Biz Failed to get database information from System Landscape Directory # # TID=9348 MID=234109629 Area=Authorization Customized=0
2024-05-28 16:48:01.120284 Genl Err I Tec LOG_GetCommonDBCredentials : get common db credential failed. # # TID=9348 palogin.c 2026 Customized=0

Please help me

entry.title: How to delete alert
entry.content:
Hi, using SAP version 10 FP2108.

According to SAP help document, alert can be deleted. I have include the help document here for reference:

Remove User AlertSelect one or multiple user alerts and choose this option to remove them.

You can configure user authorizations for alerts management in the Authorizations window.

If you’re upgrading from a lower version to SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008, users with full authorization for alerts management are given full authorization to remove user alerts by default, while users with no authorization for alerts management are given no authorization to remove user alerts by default.

But when I tried to delete by call up the relevant alert, right click and choose 'Remove', the alert is just not remove. Any idea?

entry.title: Restrict to close Production Order If Issue & Receipt Not done both are mandatory. SAP B1 10.0
entry.content:
I Want to Restrict users to close Production Order If Issue for Production is not completed even of  Receipt for production is Not done both are mandatory.

Below is my SP_Transaction Notification

IF (@object_type = '202' AND @transaction_type= 'U')

BEGIN

if exists (

SELECT T0.[DocNum]

FROM OWOR T0 INNER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]
WHERE T0.[CmpltQty] =0
and T1.[PlannedQty] > T1.[IssuedQty]
and T0.[Status] = 'L' and T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del)

Begin

set @error =1

set @error_message = 'Production Order can not be Closed,until issue and receipt done'

End

END

entry.title: Draft Report with Bin Locations - Goods Receipt PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to develop a query to display all open draft documents with the line details for goods receipt PO. this includes Bin locations however ive hit a wall as incorperating ODRF and DRF1 into OPDN, PDN1 has thrown my results fully. can any advise where im going wrong on the below:

SELECT
OPDN.DocNum,
pdn1.ItemCode,
OBTL.Quantity AS Quantity,
OBin.BinCode,
Ousr.U_NAME
FROM
opdn
INNER JOIN
pdn1 ON opdn.docentry = pdn1.docentry
INNER JOIN
OITM ON pdn1.ItemCode = OITM.ItemCode
INNER JOIN
oivl ON oivl.ItemCode = pdn1.ItemCode
AND oivl.TransType = 20
AND pdn1.LineNum = oivl.DocLineNum
LEFT JOIN
OBTL ON oivl.MessageID = obtl.MessageID
LEFT JOIN
OBIN ON obin.AbsEntry = obtl.BinAbs
LEFT JOIN
POR1 ON pdn1.BaseType = 22
AND PDN1.BaseEntry = POR1.DocEntry
AND PDN1.BaseLine = POR1.LineNum
LEFT JOIN
OPOR ON OPOR.DocEntry = POR1.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN
OUSR ON OPDN.UserSign = OUSR.USERID
WHERE
opdn.DocStatus = 'O' AND opdn.draftkey IS NOT NULL

entry.title: Addons are removed automatically after restart the server
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We want to know the reason, when we restart the server our Addons are removed automatically.
What could be the reason.

Waiting for response, please share your thoughts.

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Excel formula that I want to convert to an SQL formula so I can use it in a query.

The Excel formula is:

=D2*CEILING((B2-C2)/D2;1)

I thought I could use RoundUp, but that funcation is not available in SAP.

The formula in SAP looks like this:

t0.purpackun*RoundUp((T1.[Maxstock]-((t1.onhand-t1.iscommited)+ t1.onorder))/t0.purpackun,1) as 'Order quantity',

entry.title: In SAP B1, system considering Future Date Changes for all Transaction Documents
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
In SAP business One, one of the document is added post dated.
 
We have checked Document setting and already Future Posting Date is un-tick. 
 
How is it possible please guide us on how this is possible.
 
After investigation, we have found that, if entry is created post dated, but in chnage log it shows creation date is actual creation date.

But in the following example showing Posting date and creation date is same (31-05-2024)

 

Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: FMS OSLP, CRD1 SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello , I would need to differentiate the OSLP.SlpName for ONE OCRD when entering the sales order ORDR.  This means that if I change the CRD1 address when entering the order, the OSLP should change automatically. Can you help me please? Unfortunately we have 2 OSLP for ONE OCRD in SAP B1 And due to statistics, we cannot create  a new customer before the beginning of the next year.

Thank you, regards

Martina

entry.title: SAP Business One as adress book for MS Teams
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we recently thought about integrating SAP Business One with MS Teams.
The feature we want to use is that you highlight a phone number in SAP Business One and then press a hotkey to call that number over teams.

Or using MS Teams to search for a contact in SAP Business One.

Does anynone know if this is possible? If yes, is there any information or guide?

Kind regards,

Giano

entry.title: Hi SAP Support How to Get File PDF Layout invoice By SDK library ?
entry.content: Hi SAP Support How to Get File PDF Layout invoice By SDK library ?

entry.title: want to display GLMethod query in sap b1
entry.content:
Please help to fetch the GLMethod :

I am trying following query to display the GLMethod as Item Group, Item Level or Warehouse type. 

SELECT T0.[ItemCode], T0.[ItemName], T0.[GLMethod]
Case
When C Then 'Item Group'
When L Then 'Item Level'
When W Then 'Warehouse'
End As GLMethod

FROM OITM T0

entry.title: Documents are not cancelling, but they are pending in draft
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
There are two issues we are facing which need your guidance.
 
1. We are unable to update rejected documents. What could be the reason? We have already updated the General setting and Approval template. Attached error screenshot.
 

2. How to write SQL query for approval for updating approved document. > After updating the document should again go for the approval.

 

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Remote App Cloud Work Resources
entry.content:
Hi All 

Anyone here is a more knowledgeable Technical Expert specialised in RemoteApp Cloud Work Resources connection?

Any idea how to solve Remote App Cloud Work Resources connection problem that happens suddenly on specific windows user computer?

We have provided first level support in troubleshooting remote user RemoteApp Cloud Work Resources connection problem on specific computer.  The best workaround solution now is done to allow user remote login to SAP Business One in SAP Server using Remote Desktop Connection to SAP Server.   

 Troubleshooting steps:

Signed out the hang and disconnected remote sessions of in remote integration server Task Manager Users Tab before re login
 
Re created the Remote App Cloud Work Resources shortcut with the correct remote password   

Tested SAP User Log8 can connect SAP Business One successfully directly in the remote integration server without using RemoteApp shortcut from User Computer

Remote User is able to connect SAP Business One using RemoteApp Cloud Work Resources successfully in a different computer so we can isolate this is specific Computer related issue not remote login password issue

login as Windows Administrator or other windows user profile in the same problematic to confirm Remote App Cloud Work Resources shortcut is working or not (to be confirmed)

Last resort is reformat the Computer but there is no guarantee the same problem will not recur again
 

 Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Wrong GL is debited in Landing Cost JE
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
In SAP landed cost, after posting it, amount goes into the Expenses account (Material Price /Difference.) in case of Item is not in stock.
 
We have checked that, the stock is in the store for same batches. But still amount is added to Material Price /Difference.
 
What could be the reason. Please guide on the same.
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: How to Evaluate SAP B1 System Performance
entry.content: Hi! I just want to gather relevant information on What are the steps you need to perform in order to evaluate the System Performance of SAP B1 in a certain Post Implementation Review scenario?

entry.title: Error while trying to assign value to JournalEntry.AllocationNumberIL using DI
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to assign value to property AllocationNumberIL in Journal entry object using DI and get an exception:

"attempted to read or write protected memory. this is often an indication that other memory is corrupt."

 

I have tried to do so in add-ons based on SAPBusinessOneSDK or SAPbobsCOM and got the same exception in both cases.

I have tried to uninstall and reinstall DI API and SDK.

Sap version: SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (64-bit)

Any help will be appreciated,

Kind regards,

Odele

entry.title: inventory counting SQL query with counted batch qty
entry.content:
Hi. I am trying to write a query for inventory counting where i want it display the counted qty per batch for batch item:

but my code here, i managed to get the counted qty from INC3 table but the data duplicated. Here is my code and the outcome:


SELECT distinct
T0.ItemCode, 
T5.ItemName, 
T0.WhsCode, 
T4.DistNumber,
--SUM(T3.OnHandQty) as 'Batch Quantity',
SUM(T2.OnHandQty) as 'Total Stock Bin',
--SUM(T0.OnHand) AS 'Total Stock Warehouse',
T1.BinCode, t1.AbsEntry as 'BinEntry', t6.Quantity as 'Batch Quantity'
 
FROM 
OITW T0
INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.WhsCode = T1.WhsCode 
INNER JOIN OIBQ T2 ON T2.WhsCode = T0.WhsCode AND T1.AbsEntry = T2.BinAbs AND T0.ItemCode = T2.ItemCode
INNER JOIN OBBQ T3 ON T3.ItemCode = T0.ItemCode AND T3.BinAbs = T1.AbsEntry AND T3.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode
INNER JOIN OBTN T4 ON T4.AbsEntry = T3.SnBMDAbs
INNER JOIN OITM T5 ON T5.ItemCode = T0.ItemCode
inner join INC3 t6 on t5.ItemCode=t6.ItemCode
WHERE 
T2.OnHandQty <> 0 and t0.WhsCode='P2' and t5.ManBtchNum='Y' and t0.ItemCode='MP0742SMN013 ' --and t4.DistNumber='309677-1' --and t1.BinCode='P2-GF1'
GROUP BY 
T0.ItemCode, T5.ItemName, T0.WhsCode, 
T0.WhsCode, T1.BinCode, T4.DistNumber, t1.AbsEntry,t6.Quantity
 
 

can someone help me? i am totally stuck.

@SonTran

entry.title: Approach to find contract/piece work for SAP Business One
entry.content: Approach to find contract/piece work for SAP Business One? I have about 15 years experience with the ERP and like to work on the side.

entry.title: Want to delete DRAFT entries in bulk mode
entry.content:
I want to delete the DRAFT from year 2019. How can I delete in bulk mode?

Or can run a query to delete the DRAFT??

I create the following query. when I run query by DocNum, it works But if i add posting date selection, it gives error "1). [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 13 for SQL Server][SQL Server]The conversion of a varchar data type to a datetime data type resulted in an out-of-range value. 'User-Defined Values' (CSHS)" 

What should I do, to run the query by date selection option.

 

DELETE FROM

ODRF
WHERE
--DocNum = '20129';
DocDate = [%0] and DocDate = [%1] ;

entry.title: Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview
entry.content:
Hi, 

Different number appears instead of user name in Messages/Alerts Overview. See attached. Any idea?
